title: BEM-749 align workflow name
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 18:40 (UTC+3)'
codex=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
disp=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
text=codex.read_text(errors='ignore') if codex.exists() else ''
actual=''
for line in text.splitlines():
    if line.strip().startswith('name:'):
        actual=line.split(':',1)[1].strip().strip('"').strip("'")
        break
if not actual:
    actual='CODEX-RUNNER'
dtxt=disp.read_text(errors='ignore') if disp.exists() else ''
old=dtxt
# Replace likely wrong names with actual workflow name.
dtxt=dtxt.replace('workflows: ["Codex Runner"]','workflows: ["'+actual+'"]')
dtxt=dtxt.replace("workflows: ['Codex Runner']","workflows: ['"+actual+"']")
disp.write_text(dtxt)
changed=(old!=dtxt)
state={'schema_version':'align_dispatcher_workflow_run_name.v1','bem':'BEM-749','status':'dispatcher_workflow_name_aligned' if changed else 'dispatcher_workflow_name_already_aligned','codex_workflow_name':actual,'changed':changed,'blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem749_align_dispatcher_workflow_run_name.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem749_align_dispatcher_workflow_run_name.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-749 | Align Dispatcher Workflow-Run Name | '+state['status'].upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Codex workflow name: '+actual+sep+'Changed: '+str(changed)+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem749_align_dispatcher_workflow_run_name','status':state['status'],'codex_workflow_name':actual,'changed':changed,'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem749_align_dispatcher_workflow_run_name.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-749 '+state['status']+' codex_workflow_name='+actual+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(disp),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Aligned Claude dispatcher workflow_run trigger with actual codex-runner workflow name')
"""
No issue comments.
